messages.content: 为进一步验证弱激光疗法对于腹部皮下脂肪的减脂效果，本研究拟对弱激光疗法加以改进，采用一种复合的弱激光干预技术对受试者腹部进行每周2次、为期3周的干预

。该复合技术包括局部按摩、热敷和弱激光疗法的结合使用。具体操作方法为，每次干预前先进行局部按摩，以促进血液循环和脂肪代谢。然后使用热敷，加热皮下脂肪，使其更易于被弱激光疗法吸收。最后进行弱激光疗法，通过照射弱激光束，刺激细胞内脂肪的分解和代谢。每次干预的时间为30分钟。

本研究将招募一定数量的腹部皮下脂肪过多的受试者，并进行随机分组。干预组将接受每周2次、为期3周的复合弱激光干预，对照组将不接受任何干预。在干预前、干预后和干预结束后的1个月时，将对两组受试者进行腹部皮下脂肪厚度的测量，并记录受试者的体重变化。

预计研究结果将显示出复合弱激光干预对于腹部皮下脂肪的减脂效果较弱激光疗法单独使用更显著。这一研究的结论将为弱激光疗法的临床应用提供更为可靠的依据，并为腹部减脂提供新的干预方法。
翻译成英文“为进一步验证弱激光疗法对于腹部皮下脂肪的减脂效果，本研究拟对弱激光疗法加以改进，采用一种复合的弱激光干预技术对受试者腹部进行每周2次、为期3周的干预”

In order to further verify the effect of low-level laser therapy on reducing subcutaneous abdominal fat, this study aims to improve the low-level laser therapy by using a combination of interventions. The intervention will consist of local massage, thermotherapy, and low-level laser therapy. Specifically, prior to each intervention, a local massage will be performed to promote blood circulation and fat metabolism. Then thermotherapy will be applied to heat the subcutaneous fat, making it more receptive to the low-level laser therapy. Finally, the low-level laser therapy will be administered by irradiating the area with a weak laser beam, stimulating the breakdown and metabolism of fat cells. The intervention will be conducted twice a week for a period of 3 weeks, with each session lasting for 30 minutes.

A sufficient number of participants with excessive subcutaneous abdominal fat will be recruited for this study and randomly assigned to the intervention group or the control group. The intervention group will receive the combined low-level laser intervention twice a week for 3 weeks, while the control group will receive no intervention. The thickness of subcutaneous abdominal fat will be measured before and after the intervention, as well as 1 month after the intervention, and any changes in the participants' body weight will be recorded.

It is expected that the results of this study will demonstrate a more significant reduction in subcutaneous abdominal fat with the combined low-level laser intervention compared to the use of low-level laser therapy alone. This conclusion will provide more reliable evidence for the clinical application of low-level laser therapy and offer a new approach for abdominal fat reduction.

翻译成中文“In 2000 a new technique was introduced by Niera
etal. [36]which utilizedLLLT asan adjunct toliposuction.
They used a dose rate that caused no detectable tempera-
ture rise in the tissue and no macroscopic changes in the
tissue structure were observed [24,36]. This application of
LLLT was derived from prior investigations of LLLT in
wound healing, pain relief, and edema prevention”
在2000年，Niera等人引入了一种新的技术，将弱激光疗法(LLLT)作为辅助脂肪抽吸手术的方法[36]。他们使用了剂量导致组织内不可检测的温度升高，并且观察到组织结构没有宏观变化的情况[24,36]。这种LLLT的应用是基于其在伤口愈合、缓解疼痛和预防水肿方面的先前研究。

翻译成中文“In 2000 a new technique was introduced by Niera
etal. [36]which utilizedLLLT asan adjunct toliposuction.”
在2000年，Niera等人引入了一种新的技术，将弱激光疗法(LLLT)作为脂肪抽吸手术的辅助方法。

对“To demonstrating and enhancing the efficacy of LLLT for abdominal subcutaneous fat, this study using a composite intervention technology. for subjects abdomen 2 times a week, 3 weeks of intervention, examine the intervention before and after the abdominal fat fold thickness, waist circumference, percentage body fat, body weight change. At the same time, another group of subjects served as the control group, performed rope skipping exercises twice a week for 3 weeks, and the changes of the above indicators before and after the intervention were compared with the experimental group.”润色

In order to demonstrate and enhance the efficacy of LLLT for reducing abdominal subcutaneous fat, this study utilizes a composite intervention technology. The intervention will involve administering LLLT to the abdomen twice a week for a duration of 3 weeks. Measurements of abdominal fat fold thickness, waist circumference, percentage of body fat, and changes in body weight will be examined before and after the intervention. Simultaneously, a control group of subjects will engage in rope skipping exercises twice a week for 3 weeks, and the changes in the aforementioned indicators before and after the intervention will be compared to the experimental group.

润色“The advantage of weak laser therapy to lose weight lies in: (1)it has the characteristic of non-invasive, no side effect（6-7）；(2)is fast and effective for local fat loss（8-9）；(3)it is easy to insist without requiring the efforts of the subjects. ”

The advantage of low-level laser therapy for weight loss lies in several aspects. Firstly, it is a non-invasive technique with no known side effects [6-7]. Secondly, it has demonstrated fast and effective results in targeting localized fat loss [8-9]. Lastly, it is easy to adhere to as it does not require significant efforts from the subjects.

润色“Judging by the standards of the International Society of Life Sciences (24 <BMI <28 is overweight, and BMI> 28 is obese), obesity and overweight occurs in both genders, all ethnic groups, all geographic regions, and all educational levels (P393). Obesity is associated not only with increased mortality but also with increased use of medical care (Bertakis & Azari, 2005). Another weight-related factor associated with morbidity and mortality is weight distribution. A variety of studies have shown that patterns of body weight and the waist-to-hip ratio may be better predictors of all-cause mortality than the body mass index (Fontana & Hu, 2014; Pischon et al., 2008). Six major international medical institutions jointly issued a consensus statement, clarifying abdominal obesity as one of the five indicators of metabolic syndrome[2]. People who accumulate excess weight around their abdomen are at greater risk than people who carry their excess weight on their hips and thighs. Excess abdominal fat also raises the risk for Type 2 diabetes、cardiovascular disease and metabolic syndrome. ”

According to the standards set by the International Society of Life Sciences, both overweight (24 < BMI < 28) and obesity (BMI > 28) are prevalent among all genders, ethnic groups, geographic regions, and educational levels (P393). Notably, obesity is not solely associated with increased mortality but also with a higher utilization of medical care (Bertakis & Azari, 2005). Weight distribution is another factor related to morbidity and mortality. Numerous studies have indicated that body weight patterns and waist-to-hip ratio may be better predictors of all-cause mortality compared to the body mass index (Fontana & Hu, 2014; Pischon et al., 2008). In a consensus statement released by six major international medical institutions, abdominal obesity is recognized as one of the five indicators of metabolic syndrome [2]. Individuals who accumulate excess weight around their abdomen face a greater risk compared to those who carry excess weight on their hips and thighs. Additionally, excess abdominal fat increases the risk of developing Type 2 diabetes, cardiovascular disease, and metabolic syndrome.

润色“Low-level laser, also known as low intensity laser, refers to a low power laser that does not cause irreversible damage to the target tissue during direct irradiation. Its radiation power is usually from a few mw to hundreds of mw, and its continuous irradiation intensity is from a few to dozens of mw/cm2. Since FDA approval in 2010，more than 200,000 treatments were completed（3）.The studies as of today suggest that LLLT has a potential to be used in fat and cellulite reduction without any significant side effects. One of the main proposed mechanism of actions is based upon production of transient pores in adipocytes, allowing lipids to leak out. Another is through activation of the complement cascade which could cause induction of adipocyte apoptosis and subsequent release of lipids(4-6). The advantage of low-level laser therapy for weight loss lies in several aspects. Firstly, it is a non-invasive technique with no known side effects [6-7]. Secondly, it has demonstrated fast and effective results in targeting localized fat loss [8-9]. Lastly, it is easy to adhere to as it does not require significant efforts from the subjects.”

Low-level laser, also known as low intensity laser, refers to a type of laser with low power that does not cause irreversible damage to the target tissue during direct irradiation. Its radiation power usually ranges from a few milliwatts to hundreds of milliwatts, and its continuous irradiation intensity ranges from a few to dozens of milliwatts per square centimeter. Since receiving FDA approval in 2010, more than 200,000 treatments have been completed [3]. Current studies suggest that LLLT has the potential to be used in fat and cellulite reduction without significant side effects. One of the main proposed mechanisms of action is the production of transient pores in adipocytes, allowing lipids to leak out. Another mechanism involves the activation of the complement cascade, which may induce adipocyte apoptosis and subsequent release of lipids [4-6]. The advantages of low-level laser therapy for weight loss are noteworthy. Firstly, it is a non-invasive technique with no known side effects [6-7]. Secondly, it has shown fast and effective results in targeting localized fat loss [8-9]. Lastly, it is easy to adhere to as it does not require significant efforts from the subjects.

翻译润色成英文“25名志愿者参加弱激光干预实验。弱激光干预组（简称激光组）受试者25人，其中女性20人，男性5人，年龄27.80±8.68岁，腰围81.70±8.50cm，体重61.51±10.06kg。另招募与激光组相匹配的志愿者25名作为对照组参加跳绳练习，其中女性19人，男性6人，年龄28.72±10.78岁，腰围80.14±7.79cm，体重61.09±10.08kg。the abdominal obesity criteria are WC ≥94 cm for males and WC ≥80 cm for females.对两组入选者性别、年龄、腰围、体重进行比较，差异均不具统计学意义（P>0.05）。Health education was carried out for the patients. During the treatment, the diet should be controlled properly; drinking, sweet food, and fried food should be avoided.实验期间受试者身体健康状况良好，无肌肉疲劳现象，参照日常饮食但要求实验期间禁止喝酒，实验前24小时未进行任何形式的剧烈运动。参加本实验前均熟悉实验要求并签订协议。本研究获浙江理工大学心理学系伦理委员会批准。”

25 volunteers participated in the low-level laser intervention experiment. The intervention group, also referred to as the laser group, consisted of 25 participants, including 20 females and 5 males, with an average age of 27.80±8.68 years, waist circumference of 81.70±8.50 cm, and body weight of 61.51±10.06 kg. An additional 25 volunteers were recruited as a control group and engaged in rope skipping exercises, matching the laser group in terms of demographics. The control group comprised 19 females and 6 males, with an average age of 28.72±10.78 years, waist circumference of 80.14±7.79 cm, and body weight of 61.09±10.08 kg. The criteria for abdominal obesity were set as WC ≥ 94 cm for males and WC ≥ 80 cm for females. 
There were no statistically significant differences in gender, age, waist circumference, or body weight between the two groups (P>0.05). Health education was provided to the participants, and during the treatment, they were instructed to control their diet, avoid alcohol, sweet foods, and fried foods. The participants were in good physical health throughout the experiment, without experiencing muscle fatigue. They were informed to maintain their normal diet but refrain from consuming alcohol and avoid vigorous physical exercise 24 hours before the experiment. All participants were familiarized with the experimental requirements and signed the agreement before participating. This study was approved by the Ethics Committee of the Department of Psychology, Zhejiang Sci-Tech University.
